profile.name: synthetic
profile.intent: Self-contained synthetic profile used only by skill-os tests to exercise inventory, scaffolder, validator, and applier logic without depending on a real pack repo's skills directory.

routing.handoff_policy: Test fixture only. The router is a stub skill that has no real handoff logic.

install_policy.notes: Never install this profile in a real project. It exists only as a test fixture for skill-os.

workflow_contract.lane_selection_rule: Synthetic fixture; lane selection is trivial and not exercised by real tasks.

required_preflight: Confirm this is running inside a test fixture and not against a real project.
forbidden_actions: Do not use the synthetic profile in any real install or runtime context.
action_lane.approval_boundary: Synthetic fixture; no real approval required.

evidence_lane.confidence_policy: Test data only; no real-world confidence claims.

no_contract_lane.allowed_when: Always — this profile is a synthetic test fixture.

acceptance_checks: Kernel example references the three synthetic skills under tests/fixtures/synthetic-pack/skills/.
Profile is private-scope and never installed in real projects.
Workflow contract names test-only mutation surfaces.

private_only: tmpdir paths created during test runs
privacy_boundary.publication_audit_required_when: Never — this profile is a test fixture and is not publishable as a real skill pack.

selection_contexts: Synthetic fixture; never selected in a real runtime.

promotion_gates: Synthetic fixture never promotes; it stays a test artifact.
rejection_checks: Reject any attempt to extract or install the synthetic profile outside of skill-os tests.
